languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

languages.text: "Решение оставить Себериана было храбрым. Но нам все еще придется объяснять Адептус Аминистратум, каким образом в просторе существует два официальных Вольных Торговца фон Валанциус".
"The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."
languages.original_text: "Решение оставить Себериана было храбрым. Но нам все еще придется объяснять Адептус Аминистратум, каким образом в просторе существует два официальных Вольных Торговца фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

"For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

"For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

languages.text: 「シベリアンを去る決断は勇敢なものでしたが、それでも、アデプタ・アミニストラムに、広大な宇宙に2人の公式なフォン・ヴァランシウスのならず者商人がいる理由を説明する必要があるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

traits.locale_text: シベリアを去る決断は勇敢なものでしたが、それでも、アデプタ・アミニストラムに、広大な宇宙に2人の公式なフォン・ヴァランシウスのならず者商人がいる理由を説明する必要があるでしょう。

languages.text: « Vous avez fait preuve de courage en décidant de quitter Seberian, mais nous allons tout de même devoir expliquer à l'Adeptus Administratum comment il peut y avoir deux libres-marchands officiels dans les Étendues. »
languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez fait preuve de courage en décidant de quitter Seberian, mais nous allons tout de même devoir expliquer à l'Adeptus Administratum comment il peut y avoir deux libres-marchands officiels dans les Étendues. »

languages.text: "Die Entscheidung, Seberian zurückzulassen, war mutig. Aber wir werden dem Adeptus Administratum erklären müssen, wie es in der Koronus-Ausdehnung zwei offizielle Freihändler aus dem Geschlecht derer von Valancius geben kann."
languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

traits.locale_text: "Die Entscheidung, Seberian zurückzulassen, war mutig. Aber wir werden dem Adeptus Administratum erklären müssen, wie es in der Koronus-Ausdehnung zwei offizielle Freihändler aus dem Geschlecht derer von Valancius geben kann."

languages.text: "Seberian'ı bırakma kararı cesurcaydı. Ancak yine de Adeptus Administratum'a Enginlik'te nasıl iki resmî von Valancius Hür Taciri olabileceğini açıklamak zorunda kalacağız."
languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ı bırakma kararı cesurcaydı. Ancak yine de Adeptus Administratum'a Enginlik'te nasıl iki resmî von Valancius Hür Taciri olabileceğini açıklamak zorunda kalacağız."

languages.text: «La decisión de abandonar a Seberian fue muy valiente. Pero a ver cómo le explicamos al Adeptus Administratum que existen oficialmente dos Comerciantes Independientes de la dinastía von Valancius en la Extensión».
languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

traits.locale_text: «La decisión de abandonar a Seberian fue muy valiente. Pero a ver cómo le explicamos al Adeptus Administratum que existen oficialmente dos Comerciantes Independientes de la dinastía von Valancius en la Extensión».

languages.text: “留下塞贝里安是个可敬的决定。但我们仍需向帝国内政部解释，扩区为何会同时存在两位合法的冯·瓦兰修斯行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

traits.locale_text: “留下塞贝里安是个可敬的决定。但我们仍需向帝国内政部解释，扩区为何会同时存在两位合法的冯·瓦兰修斯行商浪人。”
